The '''Codru system''', also known as the '''Munto Codru system''', was a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] located within the [[Pakuuni sector/Legends|Pakuuni sector]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] which contained the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Munto Codru/Legends|Munto Codru]].

{{System-stub}}
